public class Solution { public int minCost(int[][] costs) { if (costs == null || costs.length == 0) return 0; int n = costs.length; int k = costs[0].length; for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) { boolean isMatch = false; for (int j = 0; j < k; j++) { int minCost = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int l = 0; l < k; l++) { if (l == j) continue; minCost = Math.min(minCost, costs[i - 1][l]); } costs[i][j] += minCost; } } return Arrays.stream(costs[n - 1]).min().getAsInt(); } }

public class Solution { public int missingNumber(int[] nums) { return Arrays.stream(nums) .filter(num -> num != 0 && num <= nums.length) .sum() - (nums.length * (nums.length + 1)) / 2; } }

public class Solution { public int missingNumber(int[] nums) { return Arrays.stream(nums) .boxed() .collect(Collectors.toSet()) .stream() .mapToInt(Integer::intValue) .sum() - (nums.length * (nums.length + 1)) / 2; } }
public class Solution { public int missingNumber(int[] nums) { return Arrays.stream(nums) .mapToInt(num -> num) .sum() - (nums.length * (nums.length + 1)) / 2; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public List findMinHeightTrees(int n, int[][] edges) { if (n == 1) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); result.add(0); return result; } initAdjList(n, edges); Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (degrees[i] == 1) queue.add(i); } while (n > 2) { int leavesSize = queue.size(); n -= leavesSize; for (int i = 0; i < leavesSize; i++) { int leaf = queue.poll(); for (int neighbor : adjList.get(leaf)) { if (--degrees[neighbor] == 1) queue.add(neighbor); } } } return new ArrayList<>(queue); } private void initAdjList(int n, int[][] edges) { degrees = new int[n]; List> adjList = new ArrayList<>(n); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjList.add(new ArrayList<>()); } for (int[] edge : edges) { adjList.get(edge[0]).add(edge[1]); adjList.get(edge[1]).add(edge[0]); degrees[edge[0]]++; degrees[edge[1]]++; } } private int[] degrees; List> adjList; }

import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public int shortestDistance(int[][] grid) { int m = grid.length; int n = grid[0].length; int[][] total_count = new int[m][n]; int[][] dist_sum = new int[m][n]; int house_count = 0; // ADD_DECLARATION Queue q; int[][] dirs = {{1, 0}, {-1, 0}, {0, 1}, {0, -1}}; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (grid[i][j] == 1) { house_count++; q = new LinkedList<>(); q.offer(new int[]{i, j}); boolean[][] visited = new boolean[m][n]; int level = 1; while (!q.isEmpty()) { int sz = q.size(); for (int q_i = 0; q_i < sz; q_i++) { int[] cur = q.poll(); int x = cur[0]; int y = cur[1]; for (int[] dir : dirs) { int x_new = x + dir[0]; int y_new = y + dir[1]; if (x_new >= 0 && x_new < m && y_new >= 0 && y_new < n && !visited[x_new][y_new] && grid[x_new][y_new] == 0) { visited[x_new][y_new] = true; q.offer(new int[]{x_new, y_new}); dist_sum[x_new][y_new] += level; total_count[x_new][y_new]++; } } } level++; } } } } int min_dist = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (total_count[i][j] == house_count) { min_dist = Math.min(min_dist, dist_sum[i][j]); } } } return min_dist == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? -1 : min_dist; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int maxProduct(String[] words) { final int value = 0; int n = words.length; int[] mask = new int[n]; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (char c : words[i].toCharArray()) { mask[i] |= (1 << (c - 'a')); } } int maxProduct = value; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { for (int j = i + 1; j < n; j++) { if ((mask[i] & mask[j]) == 0) { maxProduct = Math.max(maxProduct, words[i].length() * words[j].length()); } } } return maxProduct; } }

public class Solution { public int maxSubArrayLen(int[] nums, int k) { Map totalIndex = new HashMap<>(); int maxLength = 0, total = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { total += nums[i]; if (total == k) maxLength = i + 1; if (totalIndex.containsKey(total - k)) maxLength = Math.max(maxLength, i - totalIndex.get(total - k)); if (!totalIndex.containsKey(total)) totalIndex.put(total, i); } return maxLength; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; ListNode() {} ListNode(int val) { this.val = val; } ListNode(int val, ListNode next) { this.val = val; this.next = next; } } public class Solution { public boolean isMatch; public ListNode oddEvenList(ListNode head) { if (head == null) return null; ListNode odd = head, even = head.next, evenHead = even; while (even != null && even.next != null) { odd.next = even.next; odd = odd.next; even.next = odd.next; even = even.next; } odd.next = evenHead; return head; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; ListNode() {} ListNode(int val) { this.val = val; } ListNode(int val, ListNode next) { this.val = val; this.next = next; } } public class Solution { public boolean isMatch; public ListNode oddEvenList(ListNode head) { if (head == null) return null; // Declare booleans as LOCAL variables boolean evenExists = even != null && even.next != null; ListNode odd = head, even = head.next, evenHead = even; while (evenExists) { // Use the local variable in the if/while condition odd.next = even.next; odd = odd.next; even.next = odd.next; even = even.next; // Update the boolean to check for more pairs of nodes evenExists = even != null && even.next != null; } odd.next = evenHead; return head; } }

public class Solution { public int rob(TreeNode root) { return Math.max(robHelper(root)[0], robHelper(root)[1]); } private int[] robHelper(TreeNode node) { if (node == null) return new int[2]; int leftRob = robHelper(node.left); int rightRob = robHelper(node.right); int currentRob = node.val + leftRob[1] + rightRob[1]; int notRob = Math.max(leftRob[0], leftRob[1]) + Math.max(rightRob[0], rightRob[1]); return new int[]{currentRob, notRob}; } }

public class Solution { public int rob(TreeNode root) { return Math.max(robHelper(root)[0], robHelper(root)[1]); } private int[] robHelper(TreeNode node) { if (node == null) return new int[2]; int leftRob = 0, rightRob = 0; if (node.left != null) { int[] leftResult = robHelper(node.left); leftRob = leftResult[1]; } if (node.right != null) { int[] rightResult = robHelper(node.right); rightRob = rightResult[1]; } return new int[]{node.val + leftRob + rightRob, Math.max(leftResult[0], leftResult[1]) + Math.max(rightResult[0], rightResult[1])}; } }

public class Solution { public int wiggleMaxLength(int[] nums) { int length = nums.length; if (length < 2) return length; int up = 1, down = 1; for (int i = 1; i < length; ++i) { if (nums[i] > nums[i - 1]) up = down + 1; else if (nums[i] < nums[i - 1]) down = up + 1; } return Math.max(up, down); } }

public class Solution { public int wiggleMaxLength(int[] nums) { int length = nums.length; if (length < 2) return length; int up = 1, down = 1; for (int i = 1; i < length; ++i) { if (nums[i] > nums[i - 1]) up = down + 1; else if (nums[i] < nums[i - 1]) down = up + 1; } return Math.max(up, down); } public static void main(String[] args) { Solution solution = new Solution(); int result = solution.wiggleMaxLength(new int[]{0, 1, 7, 4, 9, 2}); System.out.println(result); // Output: 6 } }

public class Solution { public int characterReplacement(String s, int k) { int colCount = s.length(); int left = 0, right = 0, maxFreq = 0, result = 0; int[] freq = new int[26]; for (right = 0; right < colCount; right++) { freq[s.charAt(right) - 'A']++; maxFreq = Math.max(maxFreq, freq[s.charAt(right) - 'A']); if (right - left + 1 - maxFreq > k) { freq[s.charAt(left) - 'A']--; left++; } result = Math.max(result, right - left + 1); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int characterReplacement(String s, int k) { int colCount = s.length(); int left = 0, right = 0, maxFreq = 0, result = 0; int[] freq = new int[26]; for (right = 0; right < colCount; right++) { freq[s.charAt(right) - 'A']++; maxFreq = Math.max(maxFreq, freq[s.charAt(right) - 'A']); if (right - left + 1 - maxFreq > k) { freq[s.charAt(left) - 'A']--; left++; } result = Math.max(result, right - left + 1); } return result; } }

import java.util.*; class Solution { public int findMinStep(String board, String hand) { HashMap handMap = new HashMap<>(); for (char c : hand.toCharArray()) handMap.put(c, handMap.getOrDefault(c, 0) + 1); return findMinStepHelper(board, new HashMap(), handMap); } private int findMinStepHelper(String board, HashMap memo, HashMap hand) { if (board.isEmpty()) return 0; if (memo.containsKey(board)) return memo.get(board); boolean isMatch = false; // ADD_DECLARATION for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < board.length(); i = j) { while (j < board.length() && board.charAt(i) == board.charAt(j)) ++j; char color = board.charAt(i); int required = 3 - (j - i); if (hand.getOrDefault(color, 0) >= required) { hand.put(color, hand.get(color) - required); String nextBoard = board.substring(0, i) + board.substring(j); isMatch = true; // ADD_DECLARATION int tmp = findMinStepHelper(nextBoard, memo, hand); if (tmp != -1) result = Math.min(result, tmp + required); hand.put(color, hand.get(color) + required); } } int res = (result == Integer.MAX_VALUE) ? -1 : result; memo.put(board, res); return res; } }
